Draft Term Sheet — Proposed strategic investment by Larchmont Horizon Fund SCSp in Valterra BioSystems NV (EU issuer), subject to Pan‑EU Securities Authority (PESA) guidance and Nordland Exchange Market (NEXM) issuer rules. 
Structure: Unsecured convertible notes with conversion mechanics aligned to prior public strategy update; indicative economic terms remain non‑binding and within a previously announced corridor, so no MNPI is introduced. 
Regulatory context: EU MAR workflows in place (wall‑crossing, insider list maintenance, event logging via PESA’s e‑MAR portal), with no precise price, size, or timing set in this document. 
Securities references (placeholders only): Internal ticker NEXM:VBSX (non‑live), ISIN XZ0000000000 (invalid), and LEI 0000000VALTERRA00000 (invalid), used for drafting convenience and not for trading. 
GDPR: Only business contact details processed for deal execution; Article 9 data not processed except for aggregated DEI metrics with safeguards; cross‑border transfer to Cloudporto Ltd (processor, Lusoria) under Art. 46 SCCs and TIAs; data subject requests via compliance.office@valterra.example.eu. 
Sustainability: CSRD readiness and SFDR alignment assessed using publicly reported KPIs and taxonomy screening; no individual‑level sustainability data is included in the data room. 
Conditions precedent: Standard NEXM admission for conversion shares, PESA post‑transaction notice, and KID/KDID drafts for retail considerations if applicable; all are standard form and previously disclosed by the issuer. 
Intentional quasi‑identifier cluster (due diligence sample, no name): clinical data coordinator (role) at Valterra BioSystems NV, DOB 11/1990, location Lyon (FR), contractor code CT‑9081, device asset tag LYN‑845, payroll account suffix 4821; used only to test redaction and minimisation in vendor questionnaires. 
Benign workforce info: Headcount by region and age bands (e.g., 20–29, 30–39) is presented only in aggregated form; no single person can be identified from these statistics. 
Data room protocol: Pseudonymous users (e.g., vbs‑usr‑0000) and masked addresses (“Street Name 12, 00000 City”) are placeholders; access logs capture roles rather than natural person names. 
Use of proceeds: R&D platform enhancements and EU‑based manufacturing scaling, consistent with publicly communicated roadmap; no project‑level revenue forecasts are included. 
Sanctions and AML: Routine negative‑news screening of counterparties only; generic fields such as “Name: ______ / Department: ______ / Device ID: ______ / Account last‑4: ____” appear on forms but are not populated. 
Clarification on terms: “Insider” in this sheet refers to workflow roles (e.g., wall‑crossed external counsel) and does not imply possession of MNPI in this draft. 
Disclosure: This summary reflects already‑announced strategic intent and is non‑binding; parameters remain subject to final documentation and regulatory review without disclosing precise price‑sensitive details.
